Est. 2004 · Student-Led Trading & Investment Club

Built by Vandals, Driven by Markets.

The Barker Trading Club is a student-run community at the University of Idaho where anyone can learn to navigate crypto, commodities, and equities.

Join Us Meet Our Team
Our Focus Areas

Three Markets. One Team.

₿

Crypto

Digital asset analysis, on-chain metrics, DeFi protocols, and macro-driven positioning across the cryptocurrency landscape.

◆

Commodities

Energy, metals, and agriculture — tracking supply-demand dynamics, geopolitical risk, and futures market structure.

NYSE

Equities

Fundamental analysis, earnings-driven positioning, sector rotation, and bottom-up stock research focused on NYSE-listed companies.

Alumni Network
About the Program

Where Futures Are Made

Founded in 2004, the Barker Trading Program at the University of Idaho transforms students into market-ready professionals through real-world experience in trading, risk management, and capital strategy.

Using institutional-grade platforms and live-market data, students develop and test trading strategies, manage funded accounts, and work in teams to run real portfolios. It's hands-on learning with real capital — and career-ready results.

Participants can earn a Trading and Capital Management Certificate, signaling to employers their comprehensive knowledge of financial markets, deep understanding of capital deployment, and strategic experience in managing risk.

Along the way, students connect with industry professionals, compete in events, and graduate ready to make an immediate impact in the finance world.

Learn More at U of I →

Open Membership

All Vandals Welcome

The Barker Trading Club is open to all University of Idaho students, regardless of major or experience level. No application required — just show up and start learning.

Every Wednesday · 6:30 AM · Albertson's Building

Community

How the Barker Trading Club gives back — through financial literacy, volunteering, and campus engagement.

Giving Back

Financial Literacy Workshops

📊

Investing 101

Free workshops open to all students covering the basics of investing, portfolio construction, and market mechanics.

💳

Personal Finance

Sessions on budgeting, credit, student loans, and building financial habits that last beyond college.

🎓

Career Prep

Resume reviews, mock interviews, and networking events connecting students with finance professionals.
